items.title: New AI Worries End Dow Industrials’ Three-Session Winning Streak
items.description: Financial stocks fall, as Wall Street’s ‘schizophrenic personality’ on artificial intelligence stalls momentum.

items.title: Financial service companies are keeping customers in-house with free tax filing
items.description: Freedom Debt Relief is the latest company to partner with AI-powered platform april to provide free tax filing for clients.

items.title: Vatican Bank Is Picking Stocks — And It Likes Meta, Amazon The Most
items.description: The Vatican Bank introduces two equity indexes designed to track companies that adhere to the social doctrine of the Catholic Church.

items.title: SDOW: Benefits And Risks Of The Leveraged Bear Dow Jones ETF
items.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short Dow30 ETF offers -3X daily exposure to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, primarily serving short-term traders. Click here to learn more.

items.title: JPMorgan bullish on crypto for rest of year as institutional flows set to drive recovery
items.description: After bitcoin fell below its estimated production cost, the bank said stronger fundamentals and rising institutional inflows could lift crypto in 2026.
